content: Opened my old film contact sheets and found photos from our first rooftop reading. Should we do a reunion night?
Tonight's writing prompt: describe a room that changed your life in seven lines or less.
Making a neon-and-lace set for a local short film. Looking for old desk lamps and odd wallpaper scraps.
Finished my first apprentice flash sheet. Very proud, very nervous, taking celebratory soup suggestions.
Recorded six voices for the oral-history booth. Editing this weekend if anyone wants to help with transcripts.
Updated the event wall with spring dates. RSVP links are live and yes, there will be snacks.
